⚠ Modeled exposure scoring only. Not a professional engineering certification, legal advice, or official flood clearance. Based on publicly available datasets. Always conduct independent professional surveys before any property transaction.
Investment Grades
What your grade means.
A
Climate Stable
Low exposure across all dimensions. Invest with confidence.
B
Moderate Adaptation
Manageable exposure with the right design choices and budget planning.
C
High Exposure
Significant climate risk. Factor adaptation costs into your decision.
D
Significant Risk
High exposure across multiple dimensions. Proceed with extreme caution.
Built With Integrity
We protect you.
We protect ourselves.

Ndozi Climate is a modeled exposure scoring tool — not a prediction engine, not a legal clearance, not an engineering certificate. Transparent about what it is and what it isn't.

📋
Probabilistic Language
Reports use modeled, evidence-based language. We never say "this land WILL flood."
🔍
Full Data Transparency
Every report shows exactly which datasets were used, when retrieved, and what assumptions were made.
⚖️
Clear Disclaimers
Users accept terms before seeing results. Not a substitute for professional survey or engineering certification.
🔒
Your Data is Yours
We do not sell, share, or monetise your personal data or property search history. Ever.

⚠ Important Legal Disclaimer

Ndozi Climate is a climate risk assessment and exposure scoring tool based on publicly available geospatial and climate datasets. It does not constitute professional engineering certification, legal advice, a structural assessment, or an official flood clearance. All outputs are probabilistic, modelled estimates and carry inherent uncertainty. Estimated adaptation costs are indicative ranges only. Always conduct independent professional surveys, title searches, and legal reviews before any property transaction. Ndozi Climate shall not be held liable for investment decisions made on the basis of this tool's outputs. © 2025 Ndozi Climate · ndoziclimate.org
